name: rae-dictionary-raycast
title: RAE Dictionary
description: Query words in the Royal Spanish Academy dictionary directly from Raycast. Get definitions, conjugations, and expressions quickly without opening a browser. Using https://rae-api.com, unofficial API.
author: sonirico

commands.name: query-rae-word
commands.title: Query Word in RAE
commands.subtitle: RAE Dictionary
commands.description: Query a word in the RAE dictionary

commands.name: query-rae-daily-word
commands.title: Query Word of the Day in RAE
commands.subtitle: RAE Dictionary
commands.description: Query the RAE word of the day

commands.name: query-rae-random-word
commands.title: Query Random Word in RAE
commands.subtitle: RAE Dictionary
commands.description: Query a random word from the RAE dictionary

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
